issue.title: 10.com.au

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: T: Anti Adblock Script
labels.description: The site detects ad blocking

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://10.com.au/race-across-the-world](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2F10.com.au%2Frace-across-the-world) ### Comment > When I enable the AdBlock on 10Play, I'm met with this ''Unexpected Error" which prevents the videos from playing. Also, when I turn off AdBlock I have no issue playing videos which leads me to believe that it isn't something external causing the issue. This problem is the same for all videos on the site. I've also ensured my VPN is turned off as that can sometimes cause issues. > > Hopefully it can be fixed and thankyou for the otherwise highly effective online tool! :) ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/f417y0ea6g8o4oc08sgggs88k0ccw8gk8xndhzbyhw.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.3.1.31 MV3 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Other:**
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion Filters last update: | 2026-04-13T08:00:41 Tracking protection: | disabled Other extensions used: | `Shazam` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=ext&product_version=5.3.1.31&system_version=Windows+11&manifest_version=3&browser=chrome&filters=2.10&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=false&filters_last_update=2026-04-13T08%3A00%3A41)

issue.title: pc-ponta.ib-game.jp

labels.name: T: Anti Adblock Script
labels.description: The site detects ad blocking

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

<details>
<summary>Detailed description for iOS users</summary>

1. Install [**Usercripts**](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/userscripts/id1463298887) app
2. Enable **Usercripts** extension in Safari settings
	* iOS 18+: `System settings` => `Apps` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	* iOS 17 and older: `System settings` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	Find **Usercripts**, enable it and allow `On other sites` permission
4. Open the [tinyShield ](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@filteringdev/tinyshield@latest/dist/tinyShield.user.js) userscript URL in browser
5. Press the extensions icon in the address bar of Safari and select Userscripts 
6. Tap to install
7. In opened popup, scroll down and press Install button
8. Done.

</details>

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
Upon investigating by toggling the filter on and off, the issue did not occur when the AdGuard base filter was turned off.

Therefore, it appears that there is a problem with the AdGuard base filter.

### Issue URL (Ads) [https://news.sky.com](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fnews.sky.com) ### Comment > Hi there every couple of months I have to report this problem to you and I’m really not happy, I reported it to you last week again and nothing has been done. I have a paid subscription for you getting rid of adverts full stop on both my iPad and iPhone. You manage to do it for a while and then there they are again, now if you cannot manage to do this full stop just message me and once the subscription has run out I’ll find someone I can trust to do the job. So please get this done asap thank you Sandra. ### Screenshots

issue.body:
## Information

### Deutsch

Sehr geehrte Benutzerin, sehr geehrter Benutzer, aufgrund von Gesetzen ([z. B. die Gerichtsentscheidung in Karlsruhe, Deutschland im Jahre 2018](https://www.morgenpost.de/wirtschaft/article214069831/Karlsruhe-erlaubt-Werbeblocker.html)) ist es leider nicht möglich diese Paywall (Adblock-Erkennung) zu umgehen. Vielen Dank für Ihr Verständnis.

### English

Известно, что эта проблема решается с помощью AdGuard Extra.

Если вы пользуетесь AdGuard на устройствах Windows, Mac или Android, пожалуйста, убедитесь, что AdGuard Extra включена в настройках приложения.

Если вы используете расширение AdGuard для браузера, рекомендуется также установить AdGuard Extra.

* [Установка на браузеры Chrome, Edge или другие, основанные на Chromium](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_chrome_release)
* [Установка на Firefox](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_firefox_release)
